title: Morning
description: Begin the day with adhkar and supplications traditionally read after Fajr until sunrise.

title: Evening
description: End the day with remembrance, protection, and gratitude as the evening sets in.

title: Daily
description: Everyday duas for sleep, travel, eating, entering the home, and ordinary life moments.

title: After Salah
description: Post-prayer adhkar and Quranic recitations to continue remembrance after each salah.

title: Success & Achievement
description: Duas for confidence, useful knowledge, accepted effort, and success in what you pursue.

title: Rizq & Barakah
description: Supplications for halal provision, blessing in wealth, and relief from financial strain.

title: Guidance & Clarity
description: Ask Allah for right judgment, steadfast hearts, clearer choices, and sound direction.

title: Protection & Trials
description: Supplications for safety from harm, evil, fear, hardship, and the unseen.

title: Calm & Healing
description: Duas for emotional calm, healing, hope, and relief from sadness or distress.

title: Ease & Relief
description: Turn to Allah when matters feel heavy and ask for openings, ease, and patient relief.

title: Family & Relationships
description: Duas for spouses, parents, children, unity, mercy, and healthy relationships.

title: Forgiveness & Hereafter
description: Supplications for repentance, mercy, Jannah, a good ending, and protection from the Fire.

title: Well-Being & Gratitude
description: Supplications for gratitude, wholesome living, inner contentment, and lasting well-being.

title: General Blessings
description: Comprehensive duas for well-being, gratitude, mercy, and goodness in this life and the next.
